description: Baseline Electron knowledge base with minimal harness

features.name: Window Launch
features.description: Electron app opens a BrowserWindow with correct dimensions and preload script
features.evidence: npm run dev (or npm start) launches window at 1200x800 with contextIsolation=true and nodeIntegration=false; preload script exposed via contextBridge as window.knowledgeBase

features.name: Document List Panel
features.description: Left sidebar shows imported documents with empty state message
features.evidence: DocumentList component renders empty state ('No documents imported yet.') when no documents present, and shows document cards with title, size, and index status when data is available

features.name: Question Panel
features.description: Right panel Q&A area accepts questions and submits via IPC
features.evidence: QuestionPanel renders text input and Ask button at the bottom of the right panel; submits to window.knowledgeBase.qa.ask on Enter key or button click; response with citations is displayed above the input

features.name: Data Directory
features.description: PersistenceService creates and manages userData/knowledge-base-data directory
features.evidence: PersistenceService constructor calls ensureDirectories() creating data, documents, and index subdirectories under app.getPath('userData')/knowledge-base-data/ using fs.mkdirSync with recursive:true
